message:
feat(python): numpy.linalg.lstsq wrapper parity (franken_numpy-pb53)

Add fnp_python.lstsq(a, b, rcond=None) as a passthrough delegator
to np.linalg.lstsq so the 4-tuple return
(solution, residuals, rank, singular_values) and rcond
default-handling path match numpy exactly across real/complex,
rank-deficient, 1-D and 2-D b inputs.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test with four shape/rcond scenarios:
- overdetermined 3x2 fit with 1-D b (default rcond=None)
- square 2x2 exact solve (residuals empty)
- 3x2 with 2-D b (multiple RHS)
- explicit numeric rcond=1e-8
Each tuple slot (solution, residuals, rank, singular values)
is independently asserted against the numpy oracle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
